name: Sesame Meal
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 2 tablespoons of sesame seeds in a blender and blend well.
2. Add the remaining sesame seeds, 2 tablespoons at a time, and blend thoroughly after each addition.
3. Mix in the sea salt.
Use this dressing on salads, casseroles, and broiled vegetables, or as a condiment. It makes 1 cup.
